description_long: This is a military patrol boat with a low, angular hull and a flat deck, designed for riverine or shallow water operations. The boat features a green canopy with a prominent white star insignia, likely providing cover for the crew compartment. Multiple mounted machine guns are visible at the bow and stern, with protective railings and fender bumpers along the sides. The deck is equipped with barrels and other utility items, and the structure appears to be made primarily of metal with some rubber and fabric components. The vessel has a utilitarian, rugged appearance, with visible armor plating and reinforced sections. The overall design prioritizes functionality, protection, and firepower for tactical missions.
description: A military patrol boat with a green canopy, white star insignia, and multiple mounted machine guns, designed for tactical riverine operations. The vessel features metal armor plating, utility barrels, and protective railings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green canopy with white star, side railings, fender bumpers, and visible barrels at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bow-mounted machine gun, angular hull, and the canopy's star insignia.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stern-mounted gun, side railings, and the overall length of the boat.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the utility barrels, stern gun mount, and the open deck area behind the canopy.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Three visible weapon mounts: one at the bow, one at the stern, and one on the roof canopy, all configured for machine guns.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible armor plating covers the hull and sides, with reinforced sections around the crew compartment and gun mounts; plating appears moderately thick and utilitarian.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star insignia on the canopy roof; no other visible markings.
